nodes.label: Codex Implementation Plan (World Cup App Gaps)
nodes.norm_label: codex implementation plan (world cup app gaps)

nodes.label: Routing Determinism
nodes.contributor: rationale: Model selection and task routing are pure functions of lexical/semantic inputs; learning_state.json must never modify routing decisions; identical inputs must produce identical outputs

nodes.label: Learning as Advisory-Only
nodes.contributor: rationale: Learning outputs are stored as passive metadata with zero active influence on execution paths, preventing drift and ensuring determinism

nodes.label: Agent Attribute Immutability
nodes.contributor: rationale: Dynamic updates or runtime overrides of agent attributes are prohibited; read-only properties enforce base weights; mutation raises AttributeError

nodes.label: World Cup AI Content Generator Module
nodes.norm_label: world cup ai content generator module

nodes.label: LLM Dispatch Chain
nodes.contributor: rationale: 3-model fallback chain (Groq → Gemini → Hugging Face) eliminates single point of LLM failure; short vs long content use different primary LLMs based on cost and speed profiles

nodes.label: Gemini Multi-Key Quota Manager
nodes.contributor: rationale: Rotates up to 7 API keys at 1400 calls/day/key, auto-resets at UTC midnight; state persisted in memory/quota_state.json

nodes.label: evaluation_log Table (Domain Expertise Moat)
nodes.contributor: rationale: The evaluation_log is the moat — accumulated contextual sync fitness judgments at a scale no human team can produce and no competitor can replicate quickly; named after Musiio/SoundCloud acquisition precedent

nodes.label: Three-Layer Intelligence Stack
nodes.contributor: rationale: Layer 1 = DSP extraction (librosa), Layer 2 = Semantic evaluation (Gemini multimodal), Layer 3 = Classifier training from accumulated evaluation_log. Layer 3 reduces LLM calls 60-70% as log grows. Architecture is domain-agnostic.

nodes.label: FEW_SHOT_EXAMPLES (Tone × Content Type)
nodes.contributor: rationale: 18+ curated viral-quality examples keyed by (content_type, tone) pairs injected into system prompts so LLM matches real high-performing football post structure rather than generic journalism

nodes.label: Evaluation Log (The Moat)
nodes.rationale: The evaluation log is the defensible moat: every track x brief evaluation with full reasoning, fit scores, timestamps, and source flags accumulates as append-only data in Supabase. Musiio had 400M such evaluations and sold to SoundCloud. Building this dataset is the long-term competitive advantage.

nodes.label: System Trust Zones
nodes.rationale: The trust zone architecture (Core > Platform > Agents/Apps > Experimental) enforces isolation by layer: Core is the deterministic kernel, Platform wraps operational tooling, Agents/Apps are safe consumers, and Experimental is fully isolated from runtime mutation.

nodes.label: Semantic Router (Phase 3)
nodes.rationale: Semantic routing replaced keyword-based routing with intent profiles, normalized token matching, phrase scoring, cosine similarity, and confidence. Optional embedding backend gated by SEMANTIC_ROUTER_EMBEDDINGS=openai enables richer matching while keeping the router contract stable.

nodes.label: Adaptive Learning Layer (Phase 4)
nodes.rationale: Route and fusion outcomes are logged to derive model_bias and agent_bias, allowing routing to adapt over time without replacing semantic routing. Bias only kicks in at sample_size>=3 and confidence>=0.75 to prevent noise from overriding early decisions.

nodes.label: LLM Chain: Groq -> Gemini -> HF Mistral
nodes.norm_label: llm chain: groq -> gemini -> hf mistral
